name: No-Bake Cookies2
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine sugar, butter, cocoa, and milk in a saucepan.
2. Bring mixture to a boil over medium heat.
3. Continue boiling for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
4. Fold in the remaining ingredients.
5. Drop the batter onto waxed paper, flattening it with the back of a spoon or spatula.
6. Let the cookies harden on the waxed paper; work quickly to prevent them from setting before shaping.
7. Alternatively, lightly grease a 7-inch x 10-inch (or 8-inch x 10-inch) pan and pour the entire mixture into it.
8. Let set in the refrigerator for at least an hour before cutting into squares. Store any leftovers in an airtight container in the refrigerator.
